summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoConnect automotive inventory management system. Backend APIs fully functional (20/20 tests passed). Frontend login, navigation, and CRUD operations working correctly. Fixed critical timezone bug in vehicle aging calculation.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts display but show dimension errors

integration_issues.issue: User session expires during extended testing - may need longer session timeout

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@autoconnect.com / Admin123!)
User authentication and JWT token management
Dashboard page loading with KPIs and charts
Navigation between all pages (Settings, Inventory, Financial Rates)
Complete workflow: Group → Brand → Agency creation
Form validation and data-testid attributes present
